title: Reduce Code Duplication

tasks.description: Extract common filter logic - Create SearchFilterChain class with chainable filter methods (addTagFilter, addImportanceFilter, addDateFilter, addTypeFilter) used by all search operations
Extract common pagination logic - Create paginate<T>() function with PaginatedResult interface returning items, total, offset, limit, hasMore
Consolidate date handling - Create dates.ts with now(), isValidISODate(), compareDates(), isInRange() functions used throughout codebase
Remove dead code - Use ts-prune to find unused exports, search for commented-out code, remove unused utility functions and types
acceptanceCriteria: No TODO comments older than 30 days

tasks.description: Consolidate validation utilities - Create validation.ts with validateEntityName(), validateImportance(), validateTags() functions with consistent error messages

notes: This sprint focuses on DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself) - extracting common patterns into reusable utilities. The filter chain pattern is particularly important as filtering logic is currently duplicated across all search classes.
